summary: MEMO is a method allowing Retention Time (RT) agnostic alignment of metabolomics samples using the fragmentation spectra (MS2) of their constituents.
Version 0.1.0 introduced a new MemoMatrix class, replacing the former MemoContainer.

Version 0.1.2 added tests for memo_from_unaligned function. Version 0.1.2 added tests for memo_from_aligned function. Version 0.1.2 added tests for merged_memo function. Version 0.1.2 added the possibility to import memo ready feature table
